title: Hotel Guest Check-In Playbook for Egypt
trigger: Guest arrival at the hotel front desk for check-in

steps.title: Greet the Guest
steps.action: Welcome the guest warmly with a smile and a traditional Egyptian greeting. Confirm the guest's reservation details in the PMS.

steps.title: Verify Guest Identity
steps.action: Request the guest's identification and verify it against the reservation details in the PMS. Ensure compliance with local hospitality licensing requirements.

steps.title: Process Payment
steps.action: Confirm the payment method and process the transaction using PCI-DSS compliant systems. Ensure the payment is recorded in the PMS.

steps.title: Assign Room
steps.action: Assign a room based on the reservation details and guest preferences. Update the room status in the PMS and provide the guest with the room key card.

steps.title: Provide Hotel Information
steps.action: Inform the guest about hotel amenities, breakfast timings, Wi-Fi access, and emergency procedures. Offer concierge services if needed.

steps.title: Handle ID Discrepancy
steps.action: Politely inform the guest of the discrepancy and ask for additional identification or reservation confirmation. If unresolved, escalate to the Front Desk Manager.

description: This playbook outlines the step-by-step process for checking in guests at a hotel in Egypt, ensuring compliance with local regulations and enhancing guest experience.
